---
title: "Week 7: Introduction to Machine Learning"
subtitle: "BANA 7025"
format:
  revealjs:
    self-contained: true
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    revealjs-plugins:
      - appearance
      - highlight-text
    css:
      - styles.css
      - _extensions/martinomagnifico/appearance/appearance.css
    mermaid:
      theme: neutral
footer: "BANA 7025 | Week 7"
filters:
  - timer
---

# Week 7: Introduction to Machine Learning {background="#43464B"}

## Coming soon

Slides for Module 7 (Introduction to Machine Learning) will be added here.

Topics covered in this module:

- Data exploration before modeling
- First model with scikit-learn
- Feature engineering
- Model evaluation & selection
